author: bainbrid
body:
#### PR description:

  - This PR adds the missing recoGsfElectrons_lowPtGsfElectronsPreRegression collection to AOD.
  - This PR provides support for the re-miniAOD of (non-bParking, i.e. standard CMS) Ultra Legacy RECO/AOD samples produced in 10_6_X. It schedules the application of energy regression and the 2020Nov28 ID model using the modifier logic (~bParking & run2_miniAOD_UL).
  - Both the above changes ensure consistency with the back port PR https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33589.

  - Further, this PR raises the minimum pT of input tracks considered by the ElectronSeed step from 0.5 to 1.0 GeV for the bParking era. This change is also back ported to the PR https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33589. Performance details are provided in the PR description for https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33589. This change and it's motivation was presented recently to [XPOG](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1019415/contributions/4278490/attachments/2235130/3788280/210428_LowPtElectrons_XPOG.pdf), slides 8 and 9.

#### PR validation:

  - This PR has been tested locally with wfs 1304.182, 1325.518, 136.88811, 136.898. 
  - The behaviour for the logic (~bParking & run2_miniAOD_UL) has also been tested locally.
title: LowPtElectrons: support for UL re-miniAOD; bParking track pT threshold
